CustomField.formula: IF(((TEXT(leaseworks__Payment_Status__c)=='Paid' && TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c)=='Approved') || (TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c)=='Declined') || (TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c)=='Cancelled') ||(TEXT(leaseworks__Payment_Status__c)=='Credited' && TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c)=='Approved') || (leaseworks__Invoiced_Amount_Formula__c ==0)) || (today()< BLANKVALUE(leaseworks__Date_of_MR_Payment_Due__c, leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c)), null , IF(leaseworks__Mark_Invoice_Overdue__c == true, IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Date_of_MR_Payment_Due__c),today()- leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c,today()- leaseworks__Date_of_MR_Payment_Due__c + 1),today()- BLANKVALUE(leaseworks__Date_of_MR_Payment_Due__c, leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c) ))
CustomField.label: Days Outstanding
